purpose: Reference Mechanicus operator console slice for Visual Foundry with truth-first hierarchy and secondary raw mode.
interaction_rules: Primary operator actions must be visible without hunting.
Raw or technical output remains secondary and collapsible.
RU and EN labels are available through language switch.
Key truth/status pills stay readable at 1366x768.
style_constraints: no decorative clutter that harms legibility
truth_rules: Displayed truth values are static prototype values clearly labeled and not fake-live claims.
Unavailable fields must be labeled UNKNOWN instead of fabricated values.
No auto-green PASS messaging without receipt evidence.
known_gaps: Prototype uses static sample data and does not connect to live backend APIs.
